news.title:
Aether Industries reported a fire at its Surat warehouse; no casualties, operations unaffected.
Shares of Aether Industries rose 3.3%, closing at ₹1,035 on NSE after the incident.
news.summary:
Aether Industries reported a fire at its Surat warehouse; no casualties, operations unaffected.
Shares of Aether Industries rose 3.3%, closing at ₹1,035 on NSE after the incident.

news.title:
Aether Industries reported a fire at an external warehouse, controlled within 2.5 hours.
No injuries or production disruption occurred; damage assessment and insurance are in place.
news.summary:
Aether Industries reported a fire at an external warehouse, controlled within 2.5 hours.
No injuries or production disruption occurred; damage assessment and insurance are in place.

news.title:
Aether Industries participated in Emerging India Mid Caps Corporate Day in Singapore.
Meetings held with investors discussing publicly available info, ensuring no UPSI.
news.summary:
Aether Industries participated in Emerging India Mid Caps Corporate Day in Singapore.
Meetings held with investors discussing publicly available info, ensuring no UPSI.

news.title:
Aether Industries participated in investor conferences in Mumbai on Feb 24-25, 2026.
Meetings included group/one-on-one sessions with investors; no UPSI was disclosed.
news.summary:
Aether Industries participated in investor conferences in Mumbai on Feb 24-25, 2026.
Meetings included group/one-on-one sessions with investors; no UPSI was disclosed.

news.title:
Aether Industries began operations at Manufacturing Site 3 on Feb 22, 2026.
Located in Gujarat, the site is expected to enhance production and revenue.
news.summary:
Aether Industries began operations at Manufacturing Site 3 on Feb 22, 2026.
Located in Gujarat, the site is expected to enhance production and revenue.

news.title:
US tariff reduction from 50% to 18% under the 2026 trade deal boosts Indian chemical exports, valued at $5.7B in FY24.
Beneficiaries include Aarti Industries, SRF, UPL, Aether Industries, and Navin Fluorine, all reporting significant YoY revenue growth.
news.summary:
US tariff reduction from 50% to 18% under the 2026 trade deal boosts Indian chemical exports, valued at $5.7B in FY24.
Beneficiaries include Aarti Industries, SRF, UPL, Aether Industries, and Navin Fluorine, all reporting significant YoY revenue growth.

news.title:
Aether Industries reported a 44% YoY rise in Q3 FY26 revenue to INR3,171M, with EBITDA up 75% and PAT increasing 49%. Site 3 and Site 5 expansions are nearing completion.
Export revenue stood at 36% and domestic sales at 64%. The company added 5 marquee clients, introduced 3 new products, and targets 70% revenue from CRAMS and CEM in the future.
news.summary:
Aether Industries reported a 44% YoY rise in Q3 FY26 revenue to INR3,171M, with EBITDA up 75% and PAT increasing 49%. Site 3 and Site 5 expansions are nearing completion.
Export revenue stood at 36% and domestic sales at 64%. The company added 5 marquee clients, introduced 3 new products, and targets 70% revenue from CRAMS and CEM in the future.

news.title:
Aether Industries anticipates growth in oil, gas, and material science sectors by year-end.
Targets 70% revenue from CRAMS and CEM, 30% from large-scale manufacturing.
news.summary:
Aether Industries anticipates growth in oil, gas, and material science sectors by year-end.
Targets 70% revenue from CRAMS and CEM, 30% from large-scale manufacturing.

news.title:
Aether Industries expects steady Site-4 sales for FY26 and growth in FY27.
Converge Polyol sales are on track for FY26, with rising inquiries boosting FY27 confidence.
news.summary:
Aether Industries expects steady Site-4 sales for FY26 and growth in FY27.
Converge Polyol sales are on track for FY26, with rising inquiries boosting FY27 confidence.

news.title:
Aether Industries expects INR 35-40 crore sales from Otsuka Chemicals contract for FY2026.
Guides sustainable EBITDA margin of 29-30% post Q3 FY2026 boosted margin of 34% due to one-time claim.
news.summary:
Aether Industries expects INR 35-40 crore sales from Otsuka Chemicals contract for FY2026.
Guides sustainable EBITDA margin of 29-30% post Q3 FY2026 boosted margin of 34% due to one-time claim.

news.title:
Aether Industries forecasts 45-50% utilization for Site-3 and 35-40% for Site-5 by FY2027.
Major contracts from 3-4 R&D molecules expected; Miliken commercialization begins Q1 FY2027.
news.summary:
Aether Industries forecasts 45-50% utilization for Site-3 and 35-40% for Site-5 by FY2027.
Major contracts from 3-4 R&D molecules expected; Miliken commercialization begins Q1 FY2027.

news.title:
Aether Industries plans 45-50% capacity utilization at new sites by FY27.
The company reported 44% YoY revenue growth in Q3 FY26.
news.summary:
Aether Industries plans 45-50% capacity utilization at new sites by FY27.
The company reported 44% YoY revenue growth in Q3 FY26.

news.title: Aether Industries posts Q3 net profit of ₹645M, up from ₹433M YoY.
news.summary: Aether Industries posts Q3 net profit of ₹645M, up from ₹433M YoY.

news.title:
Aether Industries Ltd schedules Q3 FY26 earnings call on Feb 3, 2026, at 4 PM.
Call hosted by HDFC Securities; key executives to discuss financial performance.
news.summary:

news.title:
Aether Industries' Board Meeting is scheduled for February 3, 2026, to review Q3 FY25 financial results.
Other business transactions will also be considered during the meeting.
news.summary:

news.title:
FPIs raised stakes in AWL Agri, RBL Bank, Suzlon Energy, Waaree Energies, and others in Q3.
FPIs reduced holdings in Varun Beverages, HAL, CAMS, and others, selling equities worth Rs 11,766 crore in Q3.
news.summary:

FPIs reduced holdings in Varun Beverages, HAL, CAMS, and others, selling equities worth Rs 11,766 crore in Q3.

news.title:
Aether Industries' stock fell 2.1%, closing at ₹846.2 on Dec 5.
The decline came despite strong financial performance and positive metrics recently.

Specialty chemicals firm Aether saw strong market interest on Nov 14, 2025.
